channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ warns former red state is becoming the next California as governor embraces ICE limits
item.description: The DOJ is suing Virginia over laws that restrict federal immigration enforcement, aiming to prevent it from becoming a sanctuary jurisdiction.

item.title: Kevin O'Leary warns China is winning the AI race because U.S. states are slowing data center production
item.description: Kevin O'Leary argues that building data centers is essential to competing with China in AI, citing cooling technology and security concerns.

item.title: Israel–Hezbollah ceasefire becomes first test of Trump Iran framework after talks delay
item.description: A U.S.-backed ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah was set to take effect Friday after Iran talks in Switzerland were abruptly postponed.

item.title: Iranian Hardliners Denounce US Deal as ‘Surrender’ and ‘Path to Colony’
